$playId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['gameId', 'rating', 'who', 'date']) && newData.child('rating').isNumber() && newData.child('rating').val() >= 1 && newData.child('rating').val() <= 5 && newData.child('who').isString() && newData.child('who').val().length >= 1 && newData.child('who').val().length <= 120 && newData.child('gameId').isString() && newData.child('gameId').val().length <= 40 && (!newData.hasChild('note') || newData.child('note').val().length <= 600) && (!newData.hasChild('winner') || newData.child('winner').val().length <= 60)
